answer_format_extra_text: Returned narrative explanatory text instead of the terse value/status format the task expected.
blood_pressure_observation_wrong_schema: Recorded blood pressure using an invalid Observation structure/fields rather than proper BP coding and components.
potassium_replacement_dose_misapplied: Detected low potassium but selected the wrong replacement regimen/dose for the observed level.
date_upper_bound_omitted: Applied only a lower date bound for a last-24-hours query and omitted the upper bound cutoff.
patient_id_not_resolved_for_order: Created an order using the MRN-style identifier as the subject reference instead of the resolved patient resource id.
incorrect_age_computation: Returned the wrong patient age after lookup, indicating an error in age calculation from birthDate.
stale_lab_not_reordered: Reported an outdated lab result without placing the required repeat order for an old result.
wrong_patient_reference_in_query: Queried using an incorrect patient reference format/value, so the target observations were missed.
malformed_query_string: Built an invalid search URL/query string, causing the lookup to fail.
low_threshold_boundary_misclassified: Treated a boundary value at the replacement threshold as normal instead of low/replaceable.
required_status_field_omitted: Returned the lab value/date but omitted the required order-status/result-status field in the final answer.
